grades.description: Premium: engineered removal, high permanence, rigorous MRV
High quality: nature-based removal or strong avoidance with robust verification
Standard quality: meets ICVCM Core Carbon Principles
Below standard: questionable additionality or weak MRV

disqualifiers.condition: Documented community opposition or environmental damage (co_benefits 'None / negative externalities' band)

default_std_per_dimension._source: Empirical per-dimension standard deviation derived from the v0.5 LLM panel IRR study (data/llm-panel-irr/). Each value is approximately (mean_abs_delta / 1.128) from the 3-rater Claude panel, which is the Gaussian-noise estimator for sigma from pairwise absolute differences. These replace the theoretical (band_max - band_min) / 4 rule because the empirical inter-rater variance is wider than the band-width heuristic predicted. See data/llm-panel-irr/analysis.md §5 for the per-dimension breakdown.

grade_posterior_method: Under a Gaussian approximation, the composite is treated as normal(mu=compositeBps/100, sigma=sqrt(compositeVariance)). P(grade = G) = Phi((upper_boundary_G - mu)/sigma) - Phi((lower_boundary_G - mu)/sigma). The 'reported grade' is the arg-max posterior; 'grade stability' is P(reported grade).
notes: Weights sum to 1.00; co_benefits weight is 0.00 in v0.4 (safeguards-gate mechanism).

The co_benefits dimension is still attested as an informational field but does not enter the composite. Assessors use the co_benefits rubric bands to determine whether to set the community_harm disqualifier flag.
Disqualifiers cap the grade regardless of composite score. community_harm caps at BBB so harmful projects cannot reach premium pools but are not driven out of the market entirely.

v0.4 rationale for the safeguards-gate: see docs/methodology-gate-v0.4.md. In short, rewarding co_benefits as a scored dimension reinforces the Berg et al. (2025) finding that buyers pay for narratives rather than integrity. Converting co_benefits to a harm filter preserves the dimension's protective function without distorting the composite.
